subject: docs(sync): align documentation with actual codebase state
body:
CLAUDE.md Architecture was significantly out of sync — ~15 files/directories
missing (PWA components, UI components, debug system, hooks, lib modules,
migrations, public/, scripts/). Fixed debug system paths, removed broken
EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md reference, updated Project Status. README had Mapbox
marked as "planned" when it shipped 2026-02-26. Also fixed 4 minor code
comment issues found during audit.

Tags: docs, architecture, cleanup, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch

title: align documentation with actual codebase state
